contradictions.claim_text: Nobody does sector-specialized French plus INFPC support.
contradictions.notes: Public specialist and company-tailored French substitutes already exist.

open_issues.claim_text: INFPC co-financing of 15-35% is relevant to this product.
open_issues.notes: The public route exists, but exact eligibility for this course still depends on the training plan and buyer setup.

open_issues.claim_text: 47% of Luxembourg employees are cross-border workers, implying roughly 228k-230k people in 2024.
open_issues.notes: Use the raw official figures rather than the rounded derivative.

open_issues.claim_text: Industry-specific variants for finance, IT, retail, healthcare and public sector are fully ready.
open_issues.notes: Public evidence does not validate every proposed vertical as launch-ready.

open_issues.claim_text: CEFR progress reports and session recordings are sufficient proof of learning for buyers.
open_issues.notes: No external source establishes these outputs as a formal proof standard.
